member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Caching.RedisCacheService
member.summary: Redis-backed distributed cache implementation. Uses StackExchange.Redis for connection management and JSON serialization for values.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Caching.RedisCacheService.#ctor(StackExchange.Redis.IConnectionMultiplexer,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Caching.RedisCacheService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Caching.RedisRateLimitingMiddleware
member.summary: Redis-backed distributed rate limiting middleware using a fixed-window counter. Each client IP is tracked across all pods and proxies once normalized.
Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Caching.RedisRateLimitingMiddleware.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Evaluates the rate limit for the incoming request.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Logging.SerilogConfiguration
member.summary: Configures Serilog for structured JSON logging with: - Correlation ID enrichment - Environment-controlled log levels - Debug logs gated behind configuration (never active in production unless explicitly enabled) - Sensitive field masking

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Logging.SerilogConfiguration.UseEnterpriseLogging(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostBuilder)
member.summary: Configures Serilog on the provided . Log level is controlled via appsettings — debug output is suppressed unless Serilog:MinimumLevel:Default is explicitly set to "Debug" in configuration.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Outbox.OutboxProcessor
member.summary: Background service that polls the OutboxMessages table and publishes pending events. Uses the Outbox Pattern to guarantee at-least-once delivery without distributed transactions.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Outbox.OutboxProcessor.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceScopeFactory,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Outbox.OutboxProcessor})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Persistence.Context.AppDbContext
member.summary: EF Core DbContext for write operations only. All reads should go through Dapper query services.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Persistence.Context.AppDbContext.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptions{EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Persistence.Context.AppDbContext})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Persistence.Context.AppDbContext.Products
member.summary: Products write set.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Persistence.Context.AppDbContext.Orders
member.summary: Orders write set.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Persistence.Context.AppDbContext.OrderItems
member.summary: Order items write set.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Persistence.Context.AppDbContext.OutboxMessages
member.summary: Outbox messages for distributed event publishing.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Persistence.Context.AppDbContext.RefreshTokens
member.summary: Refresh tokens for JWT rotation.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Persistence.Context.AppDbContextAdapter
member.summary: Adapter that exposes only the operations the Application layer needs from EF Core, without depending on Infrastructure's concrete DbContext type.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Persistence.Context.AppDbContextAdapter.#ctor(EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Persistence.Context.AppDbContext)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories.ProductRepository
member.summary: EF Core implementation of . WRITE operations ONLY — reads must use the Dapper query service.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.summary: EF Core implementation of . WRITE operations ONLY — reads must use the Dapper query service.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.summary: EF Core implementation of . WRITE operations ONLY.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Queries.ProductQueryService
member.summary: Dapper-based READ-ONLY query service for Products. NEVER uses EF Core — raw SQL only via Dapper.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Queries.ProductQueryService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Queries.ProductQueryService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Queries.OrderQueryService
member.summary: Dapper-based READ-ONLY query service for Orders. NEVER uses EF Core — raw SQL only via Dapper.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Queries.OrderQueryService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Queries.OrderQueryService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Security.AzureKeyVaultSecretProvider
member.summary: Azure Key Vault implementation of . All secrets (JWT signing keys, connection strings, etc.) are retrieved from Key Vault. No secrets are stored in appsettings.json or environment variables.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Security.AzureKeyVaultSecretProvider.#ctor(Azure.Security.KeyVault.Secrets.SecretClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Security.AzureKeyVaultSecretProvider})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Security.ConfigurationSecretProvider
member.summary: Local-development secret provider backed by configuration/environment variables. This allows the app to run without Azure Key Vault.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Security.ConfigurationSecretProvider.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Security.ConfigurationSecretProvider})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Storage.AzureBlobStorageService
member.summary: Azure Blob Storage implementation of . Streams data directly to blob — no full memory buffering. Connection strings are resolved via , never from appsettings.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Storage.AzureBlobStorageService.#ctor(Azure.Storage.Blobs.BlobServiceClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{EnterpriseApp.Infrastructure.Storage.AzureBlobStorageService})
